prestazioni: Engine swap to a **LS4 (3.8L V6, L36-based, supercharged variant)** with a **Harrop TVS2300 supercharger** (12 psi boost, 450+ WHP) paired with a **Tremec TR-6060 6-speed manual transmission** (GM PN 24256593) and **Spec Stage 3+ twin-disc clutch** for LS4 applications

Full **Brian Tooley Racing (BTR) Stage 3 camshafts** (224/230 duration, .600/.600 lift) with **COMP Cams 918 valve springs** and **ARP head studs** (PN 234-4301) to handle the increased cylinder pressure

Custom **HP Tuners VCM Suite** tune with **E85 flex-fuel conversion** (via **Fuelab 41402 fuel pump** and **ID1000 injectors**), **NGK TR6IX iridium plugs** (gapped at .030"), and a **Pacesetter headers (PN 70-1308) with 3" Borla Pro XS cat-back exhaust** (PN 140631)
estetica: **RK Sport Grand Prix SJ widebody kit** (PN RK-05-001) with **custom carbon fiber front splitter** (RK Sport PN RK-05-002) and **rear diffuser** (RK Sport PN RK-05-003) for aggressive aero

**BBS CH-R 18x9.5" wheels** (ET35, 5x115 bolt pattern) wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires** (255/40/18 front, 275/35/18 rear) with **H&R Sport lowering springs** (PN 29135-1) for a 1.2" drop
**Custom interior roll cage** (by **Autopower Industries**, PN AP-7044) with **Sparco Pro 2000 seats** (PN 01979FPO) and **MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel** (350mm, suede) for track-ready ergonomics
